  "findings": [
    "Fall protection trigger height of 6 feet was ignored",
    "Lack of guardrail systems, safety net systems, or personal fall arrest systems at or above 6 feet"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work in the affected area immediately",
    "Install compliant fall protection systems such as guardrails or personal fall arrest systems before resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Under OSHA 1926 Subpart M (specifically 1926.501), duty to have fall protection is triggered at 6 feet (1.8 m) or more above a lower level in construction. Ignoring this trigger height is a critical safety violation that requires immediate work stoppage and remediation.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.501",
    "OSHA 1910.140"
  ]
}
